Collagen, biotin, and beauty-from-within support for skin, hair, and nails routines.

Product overview

What Are Our Biotin Vitamin B7 Tablets?

Struggling to keep up with complicated routines or costly treatments for thinning hair or ageing skin? Choose a simpler approach. Our Biotin Vitamin B7 Tablets deliver a high-strength 12,000µg of pure biotin, a key nutrient associated with skin, hair, and all-round well-being.

They are vegan and free from gluten and lactose, to be suitable for everyone irrespective of dietary restrictions. With just one micro 5mm tablet per day, you get a fuss-free way to stay consistent with your wellness routine.

One bottle contains 365 tablets, so you can enjoy the biotin benefits for a whole year without worrying about reordering.

Benefits of Our Biotin Vitamin B7 Tablets

Unlike standard biotin supplements, our Vitamin B7 tablets are formulated with pure biotin, ensuring a high-quality daily supplement . The European Food Safety Authority has researched the benefits of vitamin B7 (biotin) and stated that biotin-

  • Contributes to the maintenance of normal skin and normal hair*
  • Contributes to normal energy-yielding metabolism*
  • Contributes to normal functioning of the nervous system*
  • Contributes to normal psychological function*
  • Contributes to normal macronutrient metabolism*
  • Contributes to the maintenance of normal mucous membranes*
Why Choose Our Biotin Vitamin B7 Tablets?

*These health claims are authorised by the European Food Safety Authority (EFSA).

  • Here's why our biotin supplement stands out from the rest!
  • Formulated by 20+ years of expertise, with over 200 expertly developed supplements and wellness devices
  • Each tablet contains 12,000μg of pure biotin B7 vitamin, offering one of the highest potencies on the market
  • 100% free from GMOs and preservatives, so that you enjoy the benefits of biotin B7 vitamin without facing any known side effects
  • Made with all-natural ingredients and GMP-certified to ensure reliable and safe consumption
  • Each bottle contains 365 easy-to-swallow tablets, allowing you to enjoy a massive 1-year supply without the hassle of reordering
  • Third-party lab-tested for heavy metals to ensure purity and potency
  • Suitable for a wide range of dietary needs, our tablets are vegan and vegetarian, gluten-free, lactose-free, and made without magnesium stearate
  • Comes packed in recyclable bottles to promote environmental sustainability
  • Backed by a 90-day money-back guarantee , helping you try these tablets risk-free
How to use

Take 1 tablet daily with water, preferably with a meal.

Ingredients

Dicalcium Phosphate., Microcrystalline Cellulose

Nutritional information

Serving Size: 1 Tablets Servings per Container : 365

Amount per servingAmount%NRV
Vitamin B7 (Biotin As D-Biotin)12000 mcg24000
Advice and storage

Do not exceed the recommended daily dose. Food supplements must not be used as a substitute for a varied and balanced diet and a healthy lifestyle. If you are pregnant, breastfeeding, taking any medications or are under medical supervision, please consult a healthcare professional before use. Discontinue use if any adverse reactions occur. Not intended for use by persons under the age of 18.

Store in a cool, dry place. Keep out of reach of children. For best before end see the base.
